creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Palle,

you have in fact forgotten to update pkg-plist.contrib in
databases/postgresql84-server:

These lines are still there:
lib/postgresql/uuid-ossp.so
hare/postgresql/contrib/uninstall_uuid-ossp.sql
share/postgresql/contrib/uuid-ossp.sql

You can verify it at:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/databases/postgresql84-server/pkg-plist-contrib
